name: LOXs
comment: Putting here for lack of better place: there appears to have been a 10-day outage of the entire system from 6/16-6/25/2011. Pretty sure there was another in 2010-ish (June 30-July 5w 2010)? Also: notable reduction in events Jul 20-21. Real or network issues? Or hard-drive damage?
